body:
This PR downgrades Plots.jl to `1.30.1` and pins this version, which seems to have fewer issues. This is a followup to #800, which only set the compat entry. For this PR I've actually pinned it with `Pkg`:

```julia
import Pkg
Pkg.add(Pkg.PackageSpec(;name="Plots", version = "1.30.1"))
Pkg.pin("Plots")
```
title: Downgrade plots and pin version
